# Glossary {#sec-glossary}

::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Claude Code/Opus 4.8). Scaffold — to be populated from the `METHODS.md` glossary plus the additions below.
:::

*[Scaffold]* The `METHODS.md` glossary, lifted verbatim, plus the terms a mixed audience will need that it does not yet cover:

- Confidence interval vs **credible interval**
- SESOI / minimally-important difference ($\delta$, the ROPE half-width)
- NUTS / `nutpie`, R-hat, ESS, MCSE, divergences
- Prior- and posterior-predictive checks
- `elpd` / PSIS-LOO
- Beta-Binomial likelihood, logit link, LKJ
- Collider, empty adjustment set
- Waitlist-crossover, difference-in-differences (DiD)
- The floor rule, GroupKFold
